feedback.text: Dear readers, as part of the opportunity to leave feedback and suggestions on the Digital Fairness Act, I would like to draw your attention to the European Citizen Initiative ‘Stop Destroying Videogames’, which is already supported by 1.4 million EU citizens. The rules required by this initiative, which are intended to impose framework conditions on game developers in order to prevent games from being deleted or rendered implayable for customers, are, in my view, also relevant to the Digital Fairness Arc and should therefore also be taken into account. For further information on this topic, I would like to invite you to consult the websites and representatives of the Stop Killing Games and Stop Destroying Videogames initiatives.
